analysis.stakeholders: Advertisers, agencies, tool providers, internal ad sales/operations, S-Team
fitReasons: Deep ad tech background from 9 years at Yahoo — owned advertiser-facing products and targeting infrastructure
Currently building agentic AI platform at JPMC — directly maps to 'new agentic ad product' requirement
Proven GTM track record — scaled ad product adoption across advertisers and agencies
$500M+ revenue ownership demonstrates ability to drive product outcomes at Amazon's scale
Technical PM skills with ranking models, real-time decisioning, and data pipeline experience
gaps: No direct Amazon/e-commerce advertising experience — will need to learn retail media context
Sponsored Ads is a specific product family — Ili's experience is in display/targeting rather than search ads
analysis.strategy: Frame the agentic AI angle hard — Ili is one of few PMs with both deep adtech AND hands-on agentic AI experience. Position the Yahoo advertiser products work as directly transferable to Amazon's advertiser ecosystem. Emphasize technical depth with ranking models and real-time systems.

subtitles.jpmc: Agentic AI platform for investment banking – LLM-powered search, ranking, and workflow automation
subtitles.yahoo: Advertiser-facing ad products, targeting infrastructure, and monetization across 20B+ daily ad decisions
subtitles.newrelic: Billing, provisioning, and packaging systems during hypergrowth
subtitles.conversant: Mobile measurement and conversion tracking for advertiser products

resumeData.summary: Principal-level Product leader with 15+ years building advertiser-facing ad products and AI-powered platforms at scale. Currently leading agentic AI platform development at JPMorgan Chase, delivering LLM-powered search and ranking with 99% top-5 accuracy to 7,000+ users. Previously owned $500M+ annual revenue across ad targeting infrastructure at Yahoo, driving product-market fit for advertiser and agency demand across 20B+ daily ad decisions. Proven go-to-market track record scaling ad product adoption, rebuilding ranking models for 50% revenue increase, and delivering $100M+ growth. Combines deep ad tech expertise with hands-on agentic AI and real-time decisioning experience.
